go:359846.title: GATE Civil 2020 Set 2 | General Aptitude Question: 1
go:359846.question:
Rescue teams deployed _______disaster hit areas combat_______a lot of difficulties to save the people.

  1. with, at
  2. in, with
  3. with, with
  4. to, to

go:359844.title: GATE Civil 2020 Set 2 | General Aptitude Question: 2
go:359844.question:
Select the most appropriate word that can replace the underlined word without changing the meaning of the sentence:

Now-a-days, most children have a tendency to belittle the legitimate concerns of their parents.

  1. disparage
  2. applaud
  3. reduce
  4. begrudge

go:359842.title: GATE Civil 2020 Set 2 | General Aptitude Question: 3
go:359842.question:
Select the word that fits the analogy:

Partial : Impartial :: Popular: _______

  1. Impopular
  2. Dispopular
  3. Mispopular
  4. Unpopular

go:359840.title: GATE Civil 2020 Set 2 | General Aptitude Question: 4
go:359840.question:
After the inauguration of the new building, the Head of the Department (HoD) collated faculty preferences for office space. $P$ wanted a room adjacent to the lab. $Q$ wanted to be close to the lift. $R$ wanted a view of the playground and $S$ wanted a corner office.

Assuming that everyone was satisfied, which among the following shows a possible allocation?

go:359838.title: GATE Civil 2020 Set 2 | General Aptitude Question: 5
go:359838.question:
If $f(x) = x^2$ for each $x\in (-\infty,\infty)$, then $\large \dfrac{f\left(f\left(f(x)\right)\right)}{f(x)}$ is equal to _______.

  1. $f(x)$
  2. $(f(x))^2$
  3. $(f(x))^3$
  4. $(f(x))^4$

go:359836.title: GATE Civil 2020 Set 2 | General Aptitude Question: 6
go:359836.question:
Nominal interest rate is defined as the amount paid by the borrower to the lender for using the borrowed amount for a specific period of time. Real interest rate calculated on the basis of actual value (inflation-adjusted), is approximately equal to the difference between nominal rate and expected rate of inflation in the economy.

Which of the following assertions is best supported by the above information?

  1. Under high inflation, real interest rate is low and borrowers get benefited
  2. Under low inflation, real interest rate is high and borrowers get benefited
  3. Under high inflation, real interest rate is low and lenders get benefited
  4. Under low inflation, real interest rate is low and borrowers get benefited

go:359834.title: GATE Civil 2020 Set 2 | General Aptitude Question: 7
go:359834.question:
For the year $2019$, which of the previous year’s calendar can be used?

  1. $2011$
  2. $2012$
  3. $2013$
  4. $2014$

go:359832.title: GATE Civil 2020 Set 2 | General Aptitude Question: 8
go:359832.question:
The ratio of ‘the sum of the odd positive integers from $1$ to $100$’ to ‘the sum of the even positive integers from $150$ to $200$’ is ________.

  1. $45:95$
  2. $1:2$
  3. $50:91$
  4. $1:1$

go:359830.title: GATE Civil 2020 Set 2 | General Aptitude Question: 9
go:359830.question:
In a school of $1000$ students, $300$ students play chess and $600$ students play football. If $50$ students play both chess and football, the number of students who play neither is ________.

  1. $200$
  2. $150$
  3. $100$
  4. $50$

go:359557.title: GATE Mechanical 2020 Set 2 | General Aptitude Question: 1
go:359557.question:
While I agree _____ his proposal this time, I do not often agree ______ him.

  1. to, with
  2. with, to
  3. with, with
  4. to, to

go:359555.title: GATE Mechanical 2020 Set 2 | General Aptitude Question: 2
go:359555.question:
The recent measures to improve the output would ______ the level of production to our satisfaction

  1. increase
  2. decrease
  3. speed
  4. equalise

go:359553.title: GATE Mechanical 2020 Set 2 | General Aptitude Question: 3
go:359553.question:
Select the word that fits the analogy:

White: Whitening : : Light : _________

  1. Lightning
  2. Lightening
  3. Lighting
  4. Enlightening

go:359550.title: GATE Mechanical 2020 Set 2 | General Aptitude Question: 4
go:359550.question:
In one of the greatest innings ever seen in $142$ years of Test history, Ben Stokes upped the tempo in a five-and-a-half hour long stay of $219$ balls including $11$ fours and $8$ sixes that saw him finish on a $135$ not out as England squared the five-match series.

Based on their connotations in the given passage, which one of the following meanings DOES NOT match?

  1. upped = increased
  2. squared = lost
  3. tempo = enthusiasm
  4. saw = resulted in

go:359548.title: GATE Mechanical 2020 Set 2 | General Aptitude Question: 5
go:359548.question:
There are five levels $\{P, Q, R, S, T\}$ in a linear supply chain before a product reaches customers, as shown in the figure.

At each of the five levels, the price of the product is increased by $25 \%$. If the product is produced at level $P$ at the cost of Rs. $120$ per unit, what is the price paid (in rupees) by the customers?

  1. $187.50$
  2. $234.38$
  3. $292.96$
  4. $366.21$

go:359546.title: GATE Mechanical 2020 Set 2 | General Aptitude Question: 6
go:359546.question:
Climate change and resilience deal with two aspects – reduction of sources of non-renewable energy resources and reducing vulnerability of climate change aspects. The terms ‘mitigation’ and ‘adaptation’ are used to refer to these aspects, respectively.​​​​​​

Which of the following assertions is best supported by the above information?

  1. Mitigation deals with consequences of climate change
  2. Adaptation deals with causes of climate change
  3. Mitigation deals with actions taken to reduce the use of fossil fuels.
  4. Adaptation deals with actions taken to combat green-house gas emissions

go:359542.title: GATE Mechanical 2020 Set 2 | General Aptitude Question: 8
go:359542.question:
IT was estimated that $52$ men can complete a strip in a newly constructed highway connecting cities $P$ and $Q$ in $10$ days, Due to an emergency, $12$ men were sent to another project. How many number of days, more than the original estimate, will be required to complete the strip?

  1. $3$ days
  2. $5$ days
  3. $10$ days
  4. $13$ days

go:359540.title: GATE Mechanical 2020 Set 2 | General Aptitude Question: 9
go:359540.question:
An engineer measures THREE quantities, $X, Y$ and $Z$ in an experiment. She finds that they follow a relationship that is represented in the figure below$: ($the product of $X$ and $Y$ linearly varies with $Z)$

Then, which of the following statements is FALSE?

  1. For fixed $Z$; $X$ is proportional to $Y$
  2. For fixed $Y$; $X$ is proportional to $Z$
  3. For fixed $X$; $Z$ is proportional to $Y$
  4. $XY/Z$ is constant

go:359538.title: GATE Mechanical 2020 Set 2 | General Aptitude Question: 10
go:359538.question:
The two pie-charts given below show the data of total students and only girls registered in different streams in a university. If the total number of students registered in the university is $5000$, and the total number of the registered girls is $1500$; then, the ratio of boys enrolled in Arts to the girls enrolled in Management is ___________

  1. $2:1$
  2. $9:22$
  3. $11:9$
  4. $22:9$
